2008 photographyrobert frippanimation

They Come They Go

Animation composed of scanned 35mm black and white images. 1 min, displayed in an endless loop at random time intervals. Full screen viewing recommended.

Music: Robert Fripp and the Ligue of Crafty Guitarists. composed by Patricia Levitt; © Robert Fripp 1991. Curtesy of the artists and DGM Ltd.
